SEARCH

Package ai.tabforge.workshop.model

package ai.tabforge.workshop.model
Domain model for the Claude Architect Workshop MCP server.

These are pure Java records — no framework dependencies, no SDK imports. They represent the data structures that flow between all layers of the system:

  • Finding — a single issue discovered by a sub-agent
  • ReviewReport — the complete aggregated output of a review
  • ReviewScope — what to review (changed files vs full project)
  • AgentResult — what a sub-agent returns after calling Claude API
  • EscalationRequest — sent to Claude Desktop when human input is needed
  • HumanDecision — the developer's response to an escalation
  • Severity — CRITICAL / WARNING / INFO

CERTIFICATION NOTE — Prompt Engineering & Structured Output (20% of exam): The JSON schema enforced in every Anthropic API call is derived from these record types. Finding IS the output contract that every sub-agent's response_format parameter enforces.

Implemented in Phase 1 Day 3-4.

  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    ai.tabforge.workshop
     
    ai.tabforge.workshop.agent
    Abstract base classes and interfaces for Workshop sub-agents.
    ai.tabforge.workshop.agents
    Concrete sub-agent implementations for the Workshop review pipeline.
    ai.tabforge.workshop.orchestrator
    Orchestration engine — the agentic loop that coordinates all sub-agents.
  • Class
    Description
    AgentResult
    What a sub-agent returns after executing its analysis pass.
    AgentSummary
    Per-agent execution statistics included in the final ReviewReport.
    EscalationRequest
    Sent to Claude Desktop when a CRITICAL finding requires a human decision.
    Finding
    A single issue discovered by a sub-agent during code review.
    HumanDecision
    The developer's response to an escalation — recorded in the audit trail.
    HumanDecision.DecisionType
    The three choices available to the developer when an escalation occurs.
    ReviewReport
    The final aggregated output of a complete Workshop review.
    ReviewReport.ReviewStatus
    Current lifecycle state of the review session.
    ReviewScope
    Defines what to review: which files and which specialist agents to run.
    ReviewScope.FocusFilter
    Which specialist sub-agents to run.
    ReviewScope.ScopeType
    Which files to include in the review.
    Severity
    Risk level of a finding discovered by a sub-agent.
